posts.raw_content:
This place has shown its fractures. Accountability, integrity, and grit were a demand of MAGA Pede's. There has been a lot of winning, and a lot of letdowns. This place has been infiltrated by bots, MIGA, and other bad faith FAGGOTS. The Mods have let too much shit slide. Various ideas have been put forward to fix problems with infiltrators/shills, but nothing has been implemented. I've check this place almost every day for the last 7 years. I see a lot of posts that belong somewhere else and not here. I've seen plenty of bad faith posters trying to stir up shit.

For those of you who are MAGA, and want any calling themselves MAGA to be accountable to what MAGA is, and not just yes men, respect. I think a lot of us have learned that not everyone here is MAGA, and come here with an ulterior agenda. To those FAGGOTS, when I see you, I block you.

Also to those who've been here the last 7 years, here's to many more.

posts.raw_content:
Israel Derangement Syndrome is when many people in rightwing circles blame everything on Israel, jews and AIPAC.

They *literally* blame everything on Israel, explicitly so. They always say "It's the JEWS!!!!!" as being the culprit behind everything. They want us all to believe that everything bad is Israel's fault.

They prioritize this over literally every other issue. To the point that all you have to do is to insult Israel to get these people to praise you. That's why they were rallying behind Thomas Massie.

They'll literally give evil America-hating communists and muslims a pass just for hating Israel.

They even think that the right and the left can unite against Israel, and they call for it to happen. LMAO what a fucking joke. I'm not uniting with radical fucking communists, no thank you.

They have no qualms about letting communists take over America if it meant sticking it to Israel for supposedly using Trump and Republicans as puppets. I've even some explicitly say we should intentionally let the Democrats win the midterms to "keep Israel in check".

IDS is just as absurd and unfathomable as TDS. IDS causes people to eventually start accepting leftwing conclusions.

And no, Trump is not a puppet of Israel, that's just bullshit propaganda like him being a puppet of Russia.
